title: Dichromena aberrans
taxonomy: Dichromena aberrans is a species of sedge, which belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This family is further classified under the subfamily Cyperoideae. The genus Dichromena is a small group of sedges, with Dichromena aberrans being one of the species. The classification of Dichromena aberrans is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Poales, Family: Cyperaceae, Genus: Dichromena, and Species: D. aberrans. This complex classification system helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
